name: Zucchini Fritters (Andersons)
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the Bisquick, Parmesan cheese, salt, and pepper together.
2. Add the eggs to the mixture.
3. Mix in the grated zucchini.
4. Grease a hot pan or griddle with butter.
5. Pour batter into the pan and fry for 3 minutes on each side.
6. Serve warm. This recipe makes 8 to 10 fritters. THE ANDERSONS' FOOD GARDEN
